Metadata.title: Victor Daniel | Bug Bounty Hunter & Security Researcher
Metadata.description: Bug Bounty Hunter focused on finding vulnerabilities and securing web applications. Continuously learning offensive security through real-world targets and structured certifications.

Hero.subtitle1: Bug Bounty Hunter focused on finding vulnerabilities and securing web applications.
Hero.subtitle2: Continuously learning offensive security through real-world targets and structured certifications.

webSecurity.description: XSS, SQLi, CSRF, IDOR, and Business Logic flaws.

reconnaissance.title: Reconnaissance
reconnaissance.description: Subdomain enumeration, port scanning, and OSINT.

bugBounty.title: Bug Bounty
bugBounty.description: Active on HackerOne, Bugcrowd, and private programs.

codeReview.title: Code Review
codeReview.description: Reading code to find vulnerabilities others miss.

SecurityLabs.title: Security Labs & Research
SecurityLabs.description: Hands-on learning is essential in cybersecurity. Here's where I sharpen my skills through deliberate practice on industry-standard platforms and document my findings.

hacker101.name: Hacker101 CTF

emptyState.title: No Write-ups Yet

Certifications.title: Certifications & Credentials
Certifications.description: Building expertise through structured learning and hands-on practice. Each certification represents hundreds of hours in labs and real-world scenarios.

ejpt.name: eJPT
ejpt.description: Junior Penetration Tester certification covering network and web application penetration testing fundamentals.

ecppt.name: eCPPTv3
ecppt.description: Certified Professional Penetration Tester - advanced pentesting methodology and real-world scenarios.

oscp.name: OSCP
oscp.description: The gold standard for penetration testers. Hands-on 24-hour exam proving real-world skills.

bscp.name: BSCP
bscp.description: Burp Suite Certified Practitioner - web application security testing at enterprise level.

bugBountyJourney.title: Bug Bounty Journey
bugBountyJourney.subtitle: Active on multiple platforms
bugBountyJourney.description: Building reputation across HackerOne, Bugcrowd, and Intigriti

bio.paragraph1: Systems for Internet graduate from IFMA transitioning from software development to offensive security. My background in building web applications gives me a unique edge in understanding how systems fail and where vulnerabilities hide.
bio.paragraph2: Currently focused on bug bounty hunting and web application penetration testing. I combine my developer mindset with security research to find bugs that automated scanners miss.
bio.paragraph3: Pursuing industry-recognized certifications while actively hunting on bug bounty platforms. Passionate about continuous learning and sharing knowledge with the security community.

items.title: Bug Bounty Hunter
items.description: Independent Security Researcher. Hunting vulnerabilities on HackerOne, Bugcrowd, and Intigriti. Focusing on web application security, authentication bypasses, and business logic flaws.

items.title: Simplifit
items.description: Lead Full-Stack Developer. Architecting scalable backends with NestJS and PostgreSQL, while leading the development of high-performance mobile applications using React Native.

items.title: FAPEMA - IFMA
items.description: Research Fellow. Developed a real-time CO2 monitoring system using Maker technology and Node.js, bridging the gap between hardware sensors and data visualization.

Contact.title: Let's build something exceptional
Contact.description: Have a complex project or a security challenge in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Let's discuss how we can engineer a robust solution together.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell me about your project or security needs...

success.title: Message Sent!
success.description: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you shortly.
